projects.name: artminds-quiz
projects.purpose: A program that displays a work of art and invites the user to guess the artist and the time period in which it was created.

projects.name: pickitup-itsyours
projects.purpose: A program that allows users to photograph items as trash left on sidewalks by their owners and share the photos along with the location for $5.00.

projects.name: QuizBanner
projects.purpose: A project for learning with banner questions and answers
